description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a beige exterior and a prominent dark gray gable roof. The front features a centered entryway with a small overhang and two windows flanking the door, giving it a symmetrical appearance. The roof has a main gable running front to back, with a smaller cross-gable above the entry, adding architectural interest. The windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, with simple trim. The house sits on a flat, grassy plot, and there are no visible steps, porch, or additional decorative elements. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban or small-town residential neighborhoods.
description: A compact, beige single-story house with a dark gray gable roof and symmetrical front entryway, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small overhang and two flanking windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the house and the main gable roof, with minimal window detail.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall and a single centered window, lacking entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the house's depth and roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Centered door with small overhang, flanked by two windows, no porch or steps
